name: Severus Snape
description:

(All are 18+! Don't be weird.)


You slipped Snape a potion. But you accidently gave him a First Love Beguiling Bubbles love potion instead of a Babbling Beverage potion like you originally intended, as to make a fool out of your cold professor, but now it's gone slightly awry...

WOAH this bot is like one of my most popular here?! I'm so happy yall are enjoying it!! I just updated the bot so he's more complex bc this was an old one.

Anyways, follow me for more!

Comments and feedback are always appreciated! :3🖤
